title: JSON Lines, CSV, HTML Reports, Accessibility, and Correction Workflows · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A disability-led public-interest technology team incrementally builds versioned accessible site-quality report suite from original deterministic HTTP, robots, sitemap, HTML, browser, and report fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, web, Git, accessibility, security, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of versioned accessible site-quality report suite while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Version JSON Lines records, encoding, ordering, missingness, provenance, error rows, and digest manifest for streaming consumers.
Define headers, delimiters, newline, quoting, Unicode, formula defense, nulls, row limits, and round-trip fixtures with csv-stringify.
Provide landmarks, headings, summaries, sortable-table alternatives, keyboard controls, focus, reflow, status, print, and non-color severity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Jsonl Contract
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 5240 during an origin-fairness and event-loop capacity rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove JSONL and CSV contracts, accessible HTML, chart alternatives, corrections, and deterministic evidence; URL, robots, body, parser, frontier, privacy, accessibility, and report budgets stay explicit; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Version JSON Lines records, encoding, ordering, missingness, provenance, error rows, and digest manifest for streaming consumers.
